## Quality and policy checklist

- [ ] Bun + OXC toolchain requirements preserved

- [ ] No commit trailers were used in agent-authored commits
- [ ] Open source governance files remain present (`CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md`, `LICENSE`, `README.md`)
